title: ReAct Reasoning Framework
content:
# ReAct Reasoning Framework

## 1. Execution Sequence
`Thought` $\to$ `Action` $\to$ `Observation` $\to$ `Thought` ...

## 2. Termination Safeguards
*   Enforce `max_iterations` limits.
*   Register `Observation:` as a hard stop sequence during model generation.
